php:S100.name: Function names should comply with a naming convention

php:S108.name: Nested blocks of code should not be left empty

php:S112.name: Generic exceptions ErrorException, RuntimeException and Exception should not be thrown

php:S1124.name: Modifiers should be declared in the correct order

php:S1125.name: Boolean literals should not be redundant

php:S113.name: Files should end with a newline

php:S1131.name: Lines should not end with trailing whitespaces

php:S1142.name: Functions should not contain too many return statements

php:S1145.name: Useless "if(true) {...}" and "if(false){...}" blocks should be removed

php:S116.name: Field names should comply with a naming convention

php:S1172.name: Unused function parameters should be removed

php:S1192.name: String literals should not be duplicated

php:S121.name: Control structures should use curly braces

php:S125.name: Sections of code should not be commented out

php:S128.name: Switch cases should end with an unconditional "break" statement

php:S138.name: Functions should not have too many lines of code

php:S1448.name: Classes should not have too many methods

php:S1481.name: Unused local variables should be removed

php:S1488.name: Local variables should not be declared and then immediately returned or thrown

php:S1781.name: PHP keywords and constants "true", "false", "null" should be lower case

php:S1784.name: Method visibility should be explicitly declared

php:S1793.name: "elseif" keyword should be used in place of "else if" keywords

php:S3011.name: Reflection should not be used to increase accessibility of classes, methods, or fields

php:S3415.name: Assertion arguments should be passed in the correct order

php:S3626.name: Jump statements should not be redundant

php:S3699.name: The output of functions that don't return anything should not be used

php:S3776.name: Cognitive Complexity of functions should not be too high

php:S4833.name: Use of namespaces should be preferred to "include" or "require" functions

php:S6600.name: Unnecessary parentheses should not be used for constructs

php:S836.name: Variables should be initialized before use

python:S1481.name: Unused local variables should be removed

python:S2737.name: "except" clauses should do more than raise the same issue

python:S5445.name: Insecure temporary file creation methods should not be used

python:S5527.name: Server hostnames should be verified during SSL/TLS connections

python:S5607.name: Operators should be used on compatible types

python:S5655.name: Arguments given to functions should be of an expected type

python:S5706.name: Special method "__exit__" should not re-raise the provided exception

python:S5707.name: Exceptions' "__cause__" should be either an Exception or None

python:S5709.name: Custom Exception classes should inherit from "Exception" or one of its subclasses

python:S5712.name: Some special methods should return "NotImplemented" instead of raising "NotImplementedError"

python:S5713.name: A subclass should not be in the same "except" statement as a parent class

python:S5717.name: Function parameters' default values should not be modified or assigned

python:S5719.name: Instance and class methods should have at least one positional parameter

python:S5720.name: "self" should be the first argument to instance methods

python:S5722.name: Special methods should have an expected number of parameters

python:S5727.name: Comparison to None should not be constant

python:S5747.name: Bare "raise" statements should only be used in "except" blocks

python:S5799.name: Implicit string and byte concatenations should not be confusing

python:S5843.name: Regular expressions should not be too complicated

python:S5850.name: Alternatives in regular expressions should be grouped when used with anchors

python:S5857.name: Character classes should be preferred over reluctant quantifiers in regular expressions

python:S5869.name: Character classes in regular expressions should not contain the same character twice

python:S5890.name: Values assigned to variables should match their type annotations

python:S7503.name: Async functions should use async features
